scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @dicom-pipeline/contracts && tsc -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.preload.json && concurrently -k -n backend,renderer,main,preload,electron -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @dicom-pipeline/backend" "npm run dev:renderer --workspace @dicom-pipeline/desktop" "npm run dev:main --workspace @dicom-pipeline/desktop" "npm run dev:preload --workspace @dicom-pipeline/desktop" "npm run dev:electron --workspace @dicom-pipeline/desktop"
